positive: Minimalist geometric woodland scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of diverse flora and fauna (deer, fox, ferns, birch trees) arranged in a symmetrical, circular composition. The palette should use deep forest emerald, muted sapphire blue, slate grey, and bone white. High contrast, clean lines, and a graphic, linocut woodblock print aesthetic. The composition must be perfectly suited for repeat pattern or central placement on apparel, with clean edges and strong depth through overlapping silhouettes. Vector art quality, crisp edges, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, cartoon, hyperrealistic, oil painting, gradient, photorealistic
